arts.ttl: Real Madrid taunt Arsenal on social media before Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The mind games between Real Madrid and Arsenal are well under way before a ball is even kicked at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Sergio Ramos sends message to Real Madrid ahead of Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid star Sergio Ramos has on Wednesday evening sent a message of encouragement the way of his ex-employers and teammates. This, of course, comes ahead of a potentially…

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins transfer prediction made after £40m Arsenal interest and Aston Villa snub
arts.sum: Danny Murphy believes 'there will be takers' for Ollie Watkins if he hands in a transfer request at Aston Villa. The 29-year-old is still a Villa Park favourite after coming to the club from the Championship and firing them into the Champions League, but even star power was not enough to see him start Tuesday's quarter final second leg against Paris Saint-Germain .

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans create chant mocking Tottenham hours before Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have descended on the Spanish capital ahead of their Champions League quarter-final clash with Real Madrid as they chant about Tottenham's current predicament

arts.ttl: Arsenal have four Champions League suspension risks vs Real Madrid amid yellow card rule
arts.sum: The Arsenal trio were all on two yellow cards going into the first leg of their quarter-final tie, meaning a caution in the first-leg would have see them obtain a one-match suspension for three bookings in the competition and subsequently sit out the pivotal second leg at the home of the current Champions League holders. A caution for Rice, Timber, Martinelli or Partey in Madrid on Wednesday evening and they would miss the first leg of a Champions League semi-final tie if the Gunners do indeed go on to make the final four .

arts.ttl: Official: Lucas Vázquez returns as Real Madrid name starting XI to face Arsenal
arts.sum: The group of players set to be depended upon by La Liga giants Real Madrid to get the better of Arsenal this evening has been unveiled online. And it features…

arts.ttl: William Saliba sent Real Madrid transfer warning hours before crunch Arsenal Champions League clash
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Emmanuel Petit has warned William Saliba that the 'grass is not always greener' amid ongoing transfer speculation linking him with a move to Real Madrid. Saliba will play a key role in any success this evening, but Petit has fired a warning to his Frenchman amid ongoing speculation around his future.

arts.ttl: What is 'La Remontada'? Why Jude Bellingham heard same word 'a million times' before Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid need to produce a sensational comeback to down Arsenal in their Champions League quarter-final tie with all the talk in Spain of 'La Remontada' at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: ‘I was fanatical with Baggio, so changed for Zidane’
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti reveals his regret at turning down the opportunity to sign Roberto Baggio at...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal LIVE: Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Comeback is on the mind in a huge quarter-final second leg
